summary: Post-refactor regression test of NEXUS dashboard after tabs.jsx module split into components/tabs/*.jsx. All 13 dashboard nav tabs render without errors. Admin login via POST /api/auth/login (httpOnly cookie) succeeds and dashboard shell renders. Every required data-testid (stat-total-leads, intel-sources-panel, tool-dns, chat-input/chat-send, enrich-type-business, enrich-run, pi-scan, pkg-*, threat-domain, threat-scan, threat-profile-toggle) is present. Threat Intel profile-editor toggle opens editor; High-Ticket targets table renders. All 6 Governance sub-tabs (operators, tenants, audit, monitoring, pilot, outreach) switch panels correctly, and outreach-template + outreach-sandbox-email are present. No console errors, no React 'unique key' warnings, no 'is not defined' / module import errors observed on any tab.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor naming inconsistency: Governance pilot leads button is data-testid="gov-tab-pilot" while its panel is data-testid="gov-pilot-leads". Not a bug (both exist and switching works) but naming could be aligned for clarity.
Barrel /app/frontend/src/components/tabs.jsx is clean; consider using default exports or index.js convention for consistency across future splits.
test_credentials: admin@nexus.io / nexus123 (login via POST /api/auth/login then navigate to /dashboard - httpOnly cookie approach required, direct browser form login also works)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactor of tabs.jsx into components/tabs/*.jsx is fully verified. Sidebar nav uses data-testid="nav-<key>" (nav-overview, nav-leads, nav-osint, nav-ai, nav-enrich, nav-people, nav-billing, nav-reports, nav-keys, nav-threat, nav-admin, nav-scrapers, nav-storefront). Governance sub-tabs use gov-tab-<name>, panels use gov-<name>. Skipped actually sending a chat message to preserve 8/min rate-limit; chat-input/chat-send exist and prior iterations validated the reply flow.
